sentences.arabic: يَحْمِي الْأَمْنُ السِّيبِرَانِيُّ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةَ مِنَ الْمُخْتَرِقِينَ.
sentences.translation: Kibernetička sigurnost štiti naše lične podatke od hakera.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity protects our personal information from hackers.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ جِدًّا اسْتِخْدَامُ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِمَايَةِ حِسَابَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Veoma je važno koristiti jake lozinke za zaštitu naših računa.
sentences.translationEn: It is very important to use strong passwords to protect our accounts.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَجِبُ أَنْ نَفْتَحَ الرَّوَابِطَ الْمَشْبُوهَةَ فِي رَسَائِلِ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ne smijemo otvarati sumnjive linkove u e-mail porukama.
sentences.translationEn: We must not open suspicious links in email messages.
